problem:
How can I copy files from a host to a Docker container?.

I am trying to build a backup-and-restore solution for the Docker containers that we work with.

I have a Docker base image that I have created, ubuntu:base, and do not want have to rebuild it each time with a Docker file to add files to it.

I want to create a script that runs from the host machine and creates a new container using the ubuntu:base Docker image and then copies files into that contai (attempted fix: --cache-reset "Reset build cache entirely")
memory_hint: Do not use --cache-reset. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--cache-reset` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
